landing.heroTitle: An intelligent operating layer for every construction project.
landing.heroSubtitle: Pulse AI unifies consultants, contractors, owners, approvals, reports, risks, and progress into a single live surface — so no decision waits on a chase or a missing file.
landing.problemBody: Projects lose time, money, and accountability when emails, WhatsApp messages, PDFs, drawings, spreadsheets, approvals, and site reports live in disconnected places.
landing.solutionTitle: Pulse AI turns project chaos into a live operating system.
landing.solutionBody: Pulse centralizes project knowledge, automates documentation, surfaces risks early, summarizes progress, and gives every stakeholder a real-time view of project health.

modules.title: One surface for the entire project lifecycle.
modules.subtitle: Pulse connects what owners, consultants, and contractors already do — and turns it into one decision-ready view.

intelligence.title: Project intelligence
intelligence.body: AI summaries of progress, risks, and decisions across every workstream.

pulse.title: Project Pulse timeline
pulse.body: Planned vs actual milestones with delay drivers and recovery actions.

approvals.title: Approvals & submissions
approvals.body: Authority and client approvals with status, owner, and unblock path.

risks.title: Risk radar
risks.body: Early warnings with severity, impact, and a recommended next move.

documents.title: Document graph
documents.body: RFIs, MoMs, drawings, and reports linked to the decisions they affect.

reports.title: Executive reports
reports.body: Investor-grade weekly briefings and client updates, drafted by Pulse.

footer.tagline: An AI operating layer for construction.
footer.legal: © 2026 Pulse AI Demo. Presentation only — fictional data.

demoProject.name: Al Reem Tower
demoProject.location: Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE
demoProject.aiSummary: Al Reem Tower is currently at risk, with an 18-day delay driven mainly by MEP/podium coordination and unresolved authority submission dependencies. The fastest recovery path is to freeze the vertical core, resolve podium plant-room conflicts, and lock the fire strategy before the authority package date of 08-May-2026.

pulseAssistant.name: Pulse AI
pulseAssistant.label: Floating AI assistant
pulseAssistant.greeting: Schedule delay 18 days. Authority package due 08-May-2026. Podium MEP coordination unresolved; client decision on amenity floor pending. Recommend freezing vertical core this week.
pulseAssistant.fallback: I can answer this in the full connected version. For this demo, I am currently showing project health, delays, approvals, reports, risks, and recommended actions for Al Reem Tower.
